content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886
June 8, 2006

Stanton C. Hazelroth
Executive Director
California Infrastructure and Economic Development Bank
P.O. Box 2830
Sacramento, CA 95812-2830

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-101

Dear Mr. Hazelroth:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice dated May 26, 2006. Your request for advice is to approve a conflict of interest code for I*Bank.¹ Your request has been forward to Carla Wardlow in the Technical Assistance Division for processing. Therefore your request is withdrawn as a request for written advice. (Regulation 18329, copy enclosed.)

Should you have any questions, you may contact Rene Dennis at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JWW:rd

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California code of Regulations.
